nl_query: For each question paper, show the paper title, total marks, number of leaf questions, number of answer key rubrics defined, number of preparers, approval status, and the name of the user who approved it.
failed_sql: SELECT qp.title, qp.total_marks, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.max_marks IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_leaf_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT akr.question_id) AS num_answer_key_rubrics, COUNT(DISTINCT ak.preparer_id) AS num_preparers, ak.status AS approval_status, au.display_name AS approved_by_name FROM question_paper qp JOIN board b ON b.qp_id = qp.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.board_id = b.id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED' JOIN answer_key_rubric akr ON akr.answer_key_id = ak.id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = ak.preparer_id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = fc.app_user_id GROUP BY qp.title, qp.total_marks, ak.status, au.display_name
error: Validation failed (schema): Column 'ak.preparer_id' does not exist. Verify that the column is defined on the table referenced by its alias prefix, or that the alias prefix matches a table declared in FROM/JOIN.
